description: Complete knowledge base for BESCOM electricity department - used for RAG-based grievance resolution

policies.rule: Power outage exceeding 4 hours must be escalated to senior engineer
Medical emergency electricity cases resolved within 12 hours
Transformer replacement must be completed within 72 hours of failure
Faulty meter replacement within 7 working days of complaint
New electricity connection must be provided within 30 days of application
Sparking or dangerous wire complaints acted upon within 2 hours
Voltage fluctuation complaints addressed within 24 hours
Billing disputes resolved within 15 working days

contact_info.headquarters: BESCOM Corporate Office, Shakthi Bhavan, Race Course Road, Bengaluru - 560001
contact_info.emergency: 24x7 helpline for power outage and emergency

common_grievances.resolution: Call BESCOM helpline 1912. Lineman dispatched within 4 hours. For medical emergencies priority resolution within 12 hours.
Report to 1912. Engineer inspects within 24 hours. Transformer or line issue fixed within 72 hours.

common_grievances.issue: Sparking wire or dangerous electrical situation
common_grievances.resolution: Call 1912 immediately. This is an emergency. Team dispatched within 2 hours. Do not touch the wire.
Report to BESCOM. Meter inspection within 7 days. Faulty meter replaced within 15 days.

common_grievances.issue: High electricity bill or wrong billing
common_grievances.resolution: Visit BESCOM office with previous bills. Dispute resolved within 15 working days. Meter re-reading done if requested.
Call 1912. Transformer replacement within 72 hours. Temporary supply arrangement made if possible.

faq.question: How do I report a power outage?
faq.answer: Call BESCOM helpline 1912. Provide your account number and address. You will get a complaint reference number. Lineman will arrive within 4 hours.

faq.question: What if there is a sparking or hanging wire?
faq.answer: Call 1912 immediately. This is a dangerous emergency. Do not touch the wire. Team will arrive within 2 hours.

faq.question: How do I dispute my electricity bill?
faq.answer: Visit BESCOM office with your previous bills and meter reading photos. Dispute resolved within 15 working days. You can also apply online at bescom.energy.

faq.question: How do I apply for a new electricity connection?
faq.answer: Apply online at bescom.energy or visit the nearest BESCOM office. New connection provided within 30 days with required documents.
